properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v6 v7 v5 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a truth older than the ages There is a promise of things yet to come There is one born for our salvation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a light that overwhelms the darkness There is a kingdom that forever reigns There is freedom from the chains that bind us

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who walks on the waters Who speaks to the sea Who stands in the fire beside me He roars like a lion He bled as the Lamb He carries my healing in His hands

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is a name I call in times of trouble There is a song that comforts in the night There is a voice that calms the storm that rages

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Messiah My Savior There is power in Your name You're my rock and my Redeemer There is power in Your name In Your name

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You walks on the waters You speaks to the sea You stands in the fire beside me You roars like a lion You bled as the Lamb You carries my healing in Your hands

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Jesus, there is no one like You Jesus, there is no one like You
